reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the birth dates for Gaetano Donizetti and William Walton.
2. Compare the two birth dates and return the composer born later.
original_final_question: Which composer was born later, Gaetano Donizetti or William Walton? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Gaetano Donizetti was born on 29 November 1797, while William Walton was born on 29 March 1902, so William Walton was born later. -> William Turner Walton
